class.name: PlayFabPartyChatStateChange
class.brief_description: Aggregate state-change record emitted by [PlayFabPartyChat] and [PlayFabPartyChatControl].
class.description: Surfaced by [signal PlayFabPartyChat.state_changed] and [signal PlayFabPartyChatControl.state_changed]. Wraps the kind, the originating chat control, an optional [PlayFabResult], and a human-readable reason.

method.name: get_chat_control
method.description: Returns the chat control associated with the change.

method.name: get_result
method.description: Returns the optional [PlayFabResult] for the change.

method.name: get_reason
method.description: Returns the human-readable reason for the change.

members.member: Chat control associated with the change.
